name: Wicker Round French Cafe Portable Dining Table Natural - Threshold™
description:
Bring character and elegant charm to your outdoor space with this Wicker Round French Cafe Portable Dining Table from Threshold™. Standing at a 17.88-inch height, this portable French cafe table has a round tabletop woven with wicker set atop four pointed legs in a brown finish to lend visual appeal to your entertainment space. Simply add coordinating chairs to create a perfect setup for casual get-togethers or family meals.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
